# AI-Powered Project Management System

## Project Overview
Complete enterprise-grade AI-powered Project Management System with Python FastAPI backend, React.js frontend, and React Native mobile apps.

## Technology Stack
- **Backend:** Python FastAPI with microservices architecture
- **AI/ML:** TensorFlow, PyTorch, spaCy, scikit-learn
- **Frontend:** React.js with TypeScript
- **Mobile:** React Native (iOS/Android)
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
- **Security:** OAuth 2.0, JWT, RBAC
- **Deployment:** Docker, Kubernetes
